overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a morning walk along a waterfront promenade with a ferris wheel and amusement park structures, transitioning through a plaza where NPCs gather for a group activity, and finally entering a narrow foggy street between tall urban buildings. The environment shifts from bright open waterfront to darker atmospheric urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with amusement park view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade toward the ferris wheel and amusement park structures

entered.detail: large amusement park ferris wheel against the skyline
concrete stairs leading down to an underpass with metal railings
small teal-colored booth with graffiti on the side
tall palm trees lining the waterfront edge
body of water visible beyond the promenade railing

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright morning waterfront promenade with a large ferris wheel visible in the distance. The camera moves forward past concrete blocks and a green kiosk, with palm trees lining the left side and the ocean visible beyond. The space is open and exposed with clear skies.

events.description: approaching a group of NPCs gathered in a circle formation
moving through the stationary crowd of NPCs

agents.ego_description: walking through a group of NPCs gathered in a circle, passing close to a person in white clothing who appears to be leading an activity

notable_agents.action: person in white outfit gesturing with arms raised, appearing to lead a group exercise or yoga session

entered.detail: multi-story building with colorful horizontal stripes and neon signage
tall modern building with curved facade and horizontal windows

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and moves through a group of NPCs standing in a circle in an open plaza. A person in white clothing stands in the center gesturing as if leading a class. The colorful Los Osos building becomes visible on the right as the ferris wheel disappears from view behind.

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza past scattered pedestrians, moving toward the narrow street between tall buildings

entered.detail: large colorful neon billboard with stylized graphics mounted on a building

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open plaza, the camera passes the Los Osos building now on the left and approaches a tall white curved building on the right. A large neon billboard is visible ahead. The ground shows patches of sand and debris scattered across the concrete.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street between tall buildings with atmospheric fog

events.description: entering narrow urban canyon between tall buildings with reduced visibility
lighting becomes significantly darker and more atmospheric with volumetric fog effects

agents.ego_description: walking into the narrow foggy street between towering buildings, approaching distant figures

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking away down the foggy street

entered.detail: tall dark building facade creating a canyon wall on the left
tall curved building facade creating a canyon wall on the right
thick volumetric fog filling the narrow street between buildings
blue and red construction barrels and materials stacked on the ground

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions dramatically as the camera enters a narrow street between towering buildings. The open sky disappears, replaced by a canyon-like environment filled with atmospheric fog and hazy lighting. Construction materials and barrels line the cracked asphalt path as the camera moves deeper into the shadowy urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open waterfront promenade into a claustrophobic and foggy urban canyon. It begins by moving past palm trees and a green kiosk under clear skies, with a large ferris wheel anchoring the distant horizon. As the camera advances, the open vista gives way to a plaza where it weaves through a circle of NPCs gathered around a leader in white, while the colorful Los Osos building emerges to replace the disappearing ferris wheel. The scene then shifts past a tall white curved building and a neon billboard, crossing concrete ground scattered with sand and debris. Finally, the environment transitions dramatically as the camera enters a narrow street between towering buildings, where the open light vanishes into a shadowy corridor filled with atmospheric fog and construction materials.
